nasb.text: “And to the angel of the church in Thyatira write: The Son of God, who has eyes like a flame of fire, and His feet are like burnished bronze, says this:

esv.text: “And to the angel of the church in Thyatira write: ‘The words of the Son of God,     who has eyes like a flame of fire, and whose feet are like burnished bronze.

cnv.text: “你要寫信給在推雅推拉教會的使者，說： ‘　神的兒子，那眼睛像火燄、兩腳像光銅的，這樣說：

ccb.text: “你要写信告诉推雅推喇教会的天使，那位双目如火焰、双脚像闪亮精铜的上帝的儿子说，

csbs.text: “你要给那在锡亚蒂拉教会的使者    写信说： “神的儿子，就是那位眼睛如火焰、两脚仿佛精铜的，这样说：
